
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(xml2)
library(glue)
```



```{r}
url <- "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_family_relations_in_the_NHL"


tab <- read_html(url) |> 
  html_nodes("table")
```


```{r}
test2 <- tab[[2]] |> html_table()
test2
test3 <- tab[[3]] |> html_table()
test3
```


```{r}
test2 |> separate(col = Siblings, into = c("sib1", "sib2"), sep = ",") |>
  mutate(sib2 = parse_character(sib2)) |>
  mutate(last2 = Surname) |>
  mutate(sib1 = str_remove(sib1, "\\*"), sib2 = str_remove(sib2, "\\*")) |>
  unite("sib1", c(sib1, Surname), sep = " ") |>
  unite("sib2", c(sib2, last2), sep = " ") |>
  select(sib1, sib2, Country)
```


```{r}
test3 |> 
  separate(col = Children, into = c("child1", "child2"), sep = ",") |>
  filter(!is.na(child2))
  mutate(parent = str_remove(Parent, "\\*"))
```
